title: Datura | Study App
description: A study tracker that turns productivity into something you look forward to. Datura blends study session tracking, friendly competition, and avatar customization into one cohesive, full-stack app. Turn study habits into a fun, visual, and interactive experience that’s easy to stick with!

title: Pidgeo and Beeta | Puzzle Platformer
description: A 2D cooperative puzzle-platformer where a pigeon and beetle use complementary abilities to solve environmental puzzles and progress through interconnected levels. The game features asymmetric co-op gameplay and narrative-driven exploration as they uncover truths and a story of betrayal and revenge.

title: Camp Cupid | Dating Sim Alt Control
description: A dating simulation game with a physical, bow-and-arrow controller. Alt arcade style!
